warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (Second Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 50-60 kmph with wave height up to 4.5 metres are expected over the waters of Phuket within the period of Monday, 29 June 2026 until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Kedua)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 50-60 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 4.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket dalam tempoh Isnin, 29 Jun 2026 sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Perlis & Kedah, Penang, Perak, Pahang, Sarawak and Eastern Sabah until 9:00PM; Sunday, 28 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Perlis & Kedah, Pulau Pinang, Perak, Pahang, Sarawak dan Sabah Timur sehingga 9:00 malam; Ahad, 28 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the waters of Phuket, Straits of Melaka, Samui, northern part of Tioman, western part of Condore, southern part of Bunguran, Reef North, southern part of Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan and Sulu until 9:00PM; Sunday, 28 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di kawasan perairan Phuket, Selat Melaka, Samui, utara Tioman, barat Condore, selatan Bunguran, Reef North, selatan Reef South, Layang-Layang, Labuan, Palawan dan Sulu sehingga 9:00 malam; Ahad, 28 Jun 2026.

warning_issue.title_bm: Amaran Angin Kencang dan Laut Bergelora Kategori Kedua
warning_issue.title_en: Second Category Warning on Strong Winds and Rough Seas

data.heading_en: Warning on Strong Wind and Rough Seas (First Category)
data.text_en: Strong westerly winds of 40-50 kmph with wave height up to 3.5 metres are expected over the waters of Northern Straits of Melaka, Samui, Condore, Reef North and Layang-Layang within the period of Tuesday, 30 June 2026 until Thursday, 2 July 2026.
data.heading_bm: Amaran Angin kencang dan laut bergelora (Kategori Pertama)
data.text_bm: Angin kencang barat berkelajuan 40-50 kmsj dengan ombak mencapai ketinggian sehingga 3.5 meter dijangka di kawasan perairan Selat Melaka Utara, Samui, Condore, Reef North dan Layang-Layang dalam tempoh Selasa, 30 Jun 2026 sehingga Khamis, 2 Julai 2026.

data.text_en: Thunderstorms, heavy rain and strong winds are expected over the states of  Kedah  (Padang Terap, Sik and Baling);  Perak  (Larut, Matang and Selama, Hulu Perak, Kuala Kangsar, Kinta, Kampar, Batang Padang and Muallim);  Kelantan  (Tumpat, Pasir Mas, Jeli, Tanah Merah, Kuala Krai and Gua Musang);  Pahang  (Cameron Highlands, Lipis, Raub, Bentong and Temerloh);  Sarawak:  Kuching (Lundu), Samarahan (Samarahan and Simunjan), Sri Aman, Betong (Betong), Sarikei (Pakan and Julau), Sibu, Mukah (Mukah), Kapit (Song and Kapit), Bintulu (Tatau and Bintulu) and Miri (Subis); and  Sabah:  Tawau (Lahad Datu) and Sandakan (Kinabatangan and Sandakan) until 9:00PM; Sunday, 28 June 2026.
data.text_bm: Ribut petir, hujan lebat dan angin kencang dijangka di negeri  Kedah  (Padang Terap, Sik dan Baling);  Perak  (Larut, Matang Dan Selama, Hulu Perak, Kuala Kangsar, Kinta, Kampar, Batang Padang dan Muallim);  Kelantan  (Tumpat, Pasir Mas, Jeli, Tanah Merah, Kuala Krai dan Gua Musang);  Pahang  (Tanah Tinggi Cameron, Lipis, Raub, Bentong dan Temerloh);  Sarawak:  Kuching (Lundu), Samarahan (Samarahan dan Simunjan), Sri Aman, Betong (Betong), Sarikei (Pakan dan Julau), Sibu, Mukah (Mukah), Kapit (Song dan Kapit), Bintulu (Tatau dan Bintulu) dan Miri (Subis); dan  Sabah:  Tawau (Lahad Datu) dan Sandakan (Kinabatangan dan Sandakan) sehingga 9:00 malam; Ahad, 28 Jun 2026.

data.text_en: No Tropical Cyclone system is observed under MMD monitoring region (Latitude: 0-20 North & Longitude: 95-130 East)
data.text_bm: Tiada sistem Siklon Tropika dicerap di dalam kawasan pemantauan MMD (Latitud: 0-20 Utara & Longitud: 95-130 Timur)
